Alright, you're back and now it's time to get into the nitty-gritty to get serious because you know what we're doing now? We're going to discuss the practical application of vision, meaning how do you use this in a sales setting or a business setting to inspire other people to help you achieve what you want in life? You get it? Remember, people don't follow goals, they follow vision. Every human being is thirsty for one and most don't have one so they will follow yours but only if you're not a share it. That's what the straight line's all about. So let's rock and roll. Let's go into this interview right now and I'll meet you on the other side and show you exactly how you get to implement this into your own life, your own business. See you soon. So key to your success with achieving your vision is the personal why, having the personal why and then you mentioned sharing the vision so just as you shared it with your daughter, can you tell us more about that sharing your vision with the people around you? Yeah, well there's two aspects to that. One is sharing it for the purpose of self-motivation. In other words, if you almost embarrass yourself into taking action, you tell the four people, you know, I'm going to do this and you have no choice, well I got to do it now because I look like a schmuck in everyone's eyes. That's one aspect. A different aspect and probably a more important aspect. I want to say, let's say not more important, but just a very important aspect would be that you need to learn how to share your vision for the future in a way that inspires other people to actually buy into your vision. If I had tried to go out there and achieve what I achieved in the last five years in the global speaking circuit and then in the markets and everything else in the corporate world, if I try to do that as a one person army, no way. I would have never been able to achieve that. But what happened was when I met people, I needed to help me get what I want, I was able to tell them about my vision and I was able to communicate my vision in a way that was so inspiring to them that I had all the people jump on board and help me achieve my vision and they worked for far less and they would have worked for someone else because they just was like, wow, they're thirsty. See, I started off and said every human being is thirsty for a vision and so few have one. So what do they do? They gravitate, they essentially will buy into someone else's. Well, along the way, I was able to get the top people in the world in the self development industry that develop products and books and tapes and able to get them working for me because when they heard, I met this one woman, she was actually Tony Robbins, right hand person for umpteen years. She loved Tony and she had great relationship with Tony. She met me and she heard my vision and I told her what I wanted and she was so inspired. She was like, wow, it got her turned on and she came and jumped ship and worked for me. That happened with my manager, my agent, people that after selling jobs for me, they were just so into being part of the whole my redemption. They became almost bought into my redemption story because it inspired them to be part of something so amazing and because of that, bam, I had all these people had an army of people helping me get what I wanted and of course I made sure that they were able to get what they want as well. So everyone was doing it together. But if I was a one person army, just trying to make my life the way I wanted it by myself, very difficult. So understanding at the highest level how to share your vision with other people around you so they want to jump on board and help you make your vision a reality. Well that's on many levels, what the straight line is about. It's the same tactics, the same techniques, the same processes that essentially allow you to create certainty in the people around you. They become certain about your vision, certain that you're a person they want to be involved with, certain about the entity that you're building. It's the same thing, the same three tens as I speak about in the straight line. So my ability to attract great people to help me get what I want in life and give them hopefully what they want to. Well that's equally important in terms of being able to share a vision just not with my daughter or someone to help me inspire myself but to get other people inspired to make this a reality. That's the highest level. All right, you're back and that was pretty cool, right? Remember, this is important stuff here. People won't follow you because you've got to go, they follow vision. I don't care whether you're a business owner, entrepreneur, salesperson, wants to be a top producer, an average mom and dad trying to empower your own kids to live a better life. This ability to rely on vision, to sell vision to other people and then positive, not a negative, positive, empowering ethical way is going to be one of the most potent forces you have for creating change in your own life and in the life of the people you love and care about. That's why it's so cool. So let's go right now to your quiz, the exercises and I will meet you in the next lesson after you're done.
